zh.lifeSummary: 當John Langton V於1400年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利德斯時，他的父親John Langton14歲，母親Euphemia Aske2歲。他和Agnes Sawley至少有1個女兒。他去世於1467年9月17日在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾加格拉福享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Langton V was born in 1400, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Langton, was 14 and his mother, Euphemia Aske, was 2. He had at least 1 daughter with Agnes Sawley. He died on 17 September 1467, in Gargrave, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

ko.Leeds Minster, Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglate: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈 리드즈 민스터
ko.lifeSummary: John Langton V(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Langton(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia Aske(은)는 2세였다. 그는 Agnes Sawley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1467년 9월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 가그레이브에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.
